productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adizero Blue Sports Shoes
description: Take training to the next level with these Adizero F50 2 M shoes from adidas. The sleek design with the light-weight design and high performance features helps you train better for longer. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Air mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for excellent ventilation adidas patented 3-Stripe design on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand&rsquo s belief in performance Lace-ups for snug Fit Mesh tongue for greater breathability Cushioned collar for greater comfort Brand name embossed on the tongue and behind the collar Midsole adiPrene in the forefoot maintains propulsion and efficiency Midsole provides lightweight comfort Outsole adiPrene under the heel with a scooped out cavity gives superior cushioning at impact Formotion outsole technology in a slightly angular strips on the outsole offers high-wear durability Pro-moderator medial support device prevents overpronation Torsion system provides adaptive midfoot support Flex grooves provide greater flexibility to the feet shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
